name: Hero Background
usage: Full-bleed background filling the entire hero viewport. Displayed with object-cover, so edges will be cropped. Text and UI elements are layered on top with gradient overlays for readability. This image sets the mood for the entire page — it should feel warm, inviting, and atmospheric without competing with the foreground elements.
prompt: Wide atmospheric morning scene shot at golden hour across a clean light oak countertop surface. Low camera angle at surface level looking across the empty counter toward a large window in the background. Warm golden sunlight streams in from the right side, casting long honey-colored rays and soft lens flare across the frame. The window and everything beyond it is heavily out of focus, creating large soft bokeh circles of warm white and amber light with a vague suggestion of greenery outside. The countertop surface fills the bottom third of the frame and has a subtle wood grain texture catching the light. The air itself feels warm and hazy with golden morning light. No objects, no people, no product — just pure light, surface, and atmosphere. Color palette is honey gold, soft amber, warm cream, and touches of white from the window light.

scene.background: large window or open door, heavily defocused, showing bokeh circles of warm light and vague greenery
scene.surface: clean light oak countertop or table, subtle wood grain, bottom third of frame

subject.description: no subject — this is a pure atmospheric/mood image. The countertop surface and golden light are the entire composition
subject.angle: low angle at surface level, looking across the counter toward the window

camera.depth_of_field: extreme shallow — only the nearest few inches of countertop are in focus, everything else is soft bokeh

lighting.direction: side-back, streaming in from the right
lighting.shadows: soft diffused, long warm rays visible in the hazy air

style: editorial lifestyle photography, Kinfolk / Cereal magazine aesthetic, extreme shallow depth of field, atmospheric and dreamy
negative: no people, no product, no objects in focus, no text, no watermarks, no cool tones, no harsh shadows, no clutter on the counter
